headline: FedEx: SOTP Valuation Suggests That The Easy Money Has Already Been Made (Rating Upgrade)
summary: FedEx Corporation is undergoing a pivotal transformation with the June 2026 spin-off of FedEx Freight. Read why I upgrade FDX stock from Sell to Hold.
